message:
fix(tui): remove unused dashboard imports and refresh Cargo.lock

- dashboard.rs: remove 6 lines of unused import statements that
  were leftover from the previous commit's refactor
- Cargo.lock: refresh dependency checksums after workspace changes

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -280,7 +280,7 @@ dependencies = [
 
 [[package]]
 name = "asupersync"
-version = "0.2.0"
+version = "0.2.2"
 dependencies = [
  "asupersync-macros",
  "base64 0.22.1",
@@ -1474,7 +1474,7 @@ dependencies = [
